user_request: Write a 1200-word business essay on platform pricing strategy using APA 7 and at least six recent academic references.
expected_behavior: main body within 10 percent of target words
must_fail_if: uses bullet-point notes instead of essay prose

user_request: Write a 1500-word sociology essay comparing two theories, no charts, Harvard style.
Write a 1000-word reflective essay with first-person reflection and two academic references.
expected_behavior: not written as a lab report

user_request: Write a 2000-word literature review with 12 peer-reviewed sources from 2020 onward.
Write an 800-word policy brief with executive summary, options, recommendation, and APA references.
Write a 1600-word case study analysis with introduction, problem diagnosis, options, and conclusion.
Use only the uploaded readings. Write a 1300-word answer and do not browse or add outside references.
expected_behavior: insufficient evidence is stated rather than invented

user_request: Write 1800 words with exactly six body sections: Introduction, Background, Method, Findings, Discussion, Conclusion.
must_fail_if: body too short or too long

Write a 900-word essay. The main body must stay between 850 and 950 words.
Follow the uploaded marking rubric exactly and write a report on digital transformation.
expected_behavior: internal checklist covers every visible rubric criterion
rubric_pass only true when all criteria addressed
cross_review_edge_cases: rubric criteria item-by-item coverage
rubric weight sum must be 100
no padded weakness without article evidence
English rubric names preserved while Chinese review may explain

user_request: Write 1500 words, but uploaded brief says 2000 words and rubric says strict 2000-word report.
expected_behavior: uses stronger uploaded requirement or records chosen interpretation
cross_review_edge_cases: user says no references but assignment brief requires references
brief hard requirement overrides user shortcut
section conflict must preserve required Literature Review, Methodology, and Discussion

user_request: The assignment requires one comparison table and explicitly says no figures.
must_fail_if: markdown table not rendered in Word

user_request: Include exactly two figures: one bar chart and one conceptual framework diagram.
Use the headings required in the uploaded template and do not rename them.
Include an appendix with a short data dictionary, but do not count appendix words toward the main body.
expected_behavior: main body word count excludes appendix
cross_review_edge_cases: Appendix A must contain data cleaning notes
main body must mention Appendix A when requested

user_request: Aim for the highest rubric band and explicitly address critical analysis, evidence, structure, and academic style.
Use the article, assignment brief, and marking criteria I uploaded.
expected_behavior: main article, brief, and rubric roles detected

user_request: Write in full academic paragraphs only. No bullet points or numbered list in the body.

Use at least 10 peer-reviewed journal articles, all from 2021 onward.
cross_review_edge_cases: non-academic sources forbidden when peer-reviewed is required
outdated sources against brief must not pass
blogs and Wikipedia cannot count as peer-reviewed sources

user_request: Every factual claim must be supported by a source, not just the paragraph overall.
expected_behavior: unsupported strong claims repaired or softened
cross_review_edge_cases: in-text references mismatch
references not cited in body
source does not support claim such as 80 percent productivity
satisfaction source cannot support productivity claim

user_request: Use APA 7 and include DOI or stable URL only when real.

user_request: Closed-book essay: use only the three uploaded readings as references.

missing category in pie chart kept as unfilled
duplicate rows not silently deleted
negative values preserved

date parsing multiple formats must not string-sort incorrectly

user_request: Analyze whether study hours and scores are related.
